title: Nibiru, Marduk & the Battle Planet
summary: Anu's artificial world-ship — the 'Archangel' — and the destroyer planets of the deep past.
markdown:
**Nibiru** — also called **Marduk** — is described in the [Anunnaki](/lore/anunnaki/) session
as no natural planet but an artificial **"Battle Planet"**: Anu's world-ship, escorted by
moon-sized companions, whose name the session translates as **"Archangel."** It rides a long
elliptical orbit (the sessions give both the classic 3,600-year figure and a 26,000-year
cycle), positioned — in Anu's telling — to **shield the solar system from reptilian
intrusion**. Its power is not theoretical: the session says it destroyed **Bellona**, a planet
between Mars and the outer worlds, whose remains scatter the asteroid belt.

The December 7, 2020 session adds the tragic mirror: a planetary war around **550,000 BC**
destroyed **Marduk Belona**, and the survivors' consciousness was preserved by a backup
protocol — becoming, through the [Moon computer](/lore/the-moon/) and the splicing of DNA,
part of humanity itself.

A destroyer-planet appears once more in the archive: the July 17, 2020 session's
**"Destroyer"** — a battle planet "already here in the form of cube unit matrices," dispatched
by the Council as an enforcement power. World-ships, in this record, are both shield and
sword — and humanity lives in the orbit of both.
